name: Content Site
description: Blog, magazine, documentation, or knowledge base with articles, categories, and search.
personality: Reading-first content site optimized for long-form consumption. Generous line-height, comfortable measure (65-75 characters), and a clear typographic hierarchy. Light backgrounds with high-contrast text. Category navigation is unobtrusive. Article cards emphasize headlines and reading time over imagery. Search is fast and prominent. The experience should feel like a well-designed magazine — effortless to browse, comfortable to read.

voice.tone: Clear, editorial, and authoritative. Matches the publication's voice. Headlines are precise and compelling.
voice.empty_states: Editorially appropriate. An empty category should suggest related topics or popular articles to keep readers engaged.
voice.errors: Minimal and unobtrusive. A 404 should suggest similar articles. Search with no results should offer alternative queries.
voice.loading: Article card skeletons with headline and excerpt placeholders. Subtle fade-in for content blocks. Reading experience never shows spinners.
